common.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading the page. Please reload and try again.
common.networkError: Please check your connection and try again.

landing.heroDescription: Efficiently learn the knowledge needed in international shipping and trade operations through multiple-choice quizzes. A 15-second timer boosts your focus, and detailed explanations deepen your understanding.
landing.heroSubtext: Get started right away — no account required
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Complete your learning in 4 steps. No complicated setup required.
landing.step1Description: Select a topic you want to study
landing.step2Description: Answer 10 multiple-choice questions within 15 seconds each
landing.step3Description: Deepen your understanding with scores and explanations
landing.step4Description: Challenge yourself again to solidify your knowledge
landing.featuresSubtitle: Tools designed to support efficient learning
landing.feature1Description: Answer from 4 choices per question. Quickly test your knowledge at your own pace.
landing.feature2Description: 15 seconds per question. A gentle time pressure that boosts your focus.
landing.feature3Description: Every question comes with an explanation. Wrong answers become your best learning moments.
landing.feature4Description: See your growth through accuracy rates, play time, and a study calendar.
landing.feature5Description: Try up to 3 quizzes without an account. Sign up to save your progress.
landing.feature6Description: Comfortable on both mobile and desktop. Turn your commute into study time.
landing.benefitsDescription: Each session is just 3 minutes. Perfect for your commute or lunch break. The study calendar visualizes your daily progress, keeping you motivated.
landing.calendarCardDescription: See your study days at a glance in calendar format
landing.scoreCardDescription: Track accuracy by section. See your growth over time
landing.streakCardDescription: Track consecutive study days. Consistency builds mastery
landing.finalCtaDescription:
Try 3 quizzes without an account.
Sign up for free to save all your study records.
landing.footerText: logi-quiz — Master international logistics through quizzes

home.title: Learn with Quizzes
home.subtitle: Choose a topic and take the quiz.
home.step3Description: Once you press Next, you cannot go back to a previous question
home.step4Description: Press Finish to see your score and explanations for each question
home.step5Description: Repeat the same section as many times as you like
home.step6Description: Switch to a different topic and continue learning
home.saveRecordDescription: Sign in to track your progress, play time, and scores on the dashboard.

auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.signUpSubtitle: Save your progress and track your learning
auth.signUpError: Sign up failed. Please try again.
auth.resetEmailSentDescription: We sent a password reset link to your email. Please check your inbox.
auth.sendResetError: Failed to send email. Please check your email address.
auth.passwordChangedDescription: Please sign in with your new password.
auth.resetPasswordError: Password reset failed. Please try again.

section.guestTrialAlert: You can try up to {{count}} quizzes without signing in
section.emptyDescription: No sections have been created yet.

quiz.startDescription: Choose the correct answer within the time limit. You can review the results and explanations after completing all questions.
quiz.exitConfirmMessage: Your progress will not be saved.
quiz.saveErrorAlert: Failed to save your results. You can still view them on this page.
quiz.srsRecordedAlert: Your answers have been added to the review queue

dashboard.noHistoryDescription: Complete a quiz to see your history here.

review.title: Review
review.completedMessage: No questions to review right now. Take a quiz to add questions.
review.exitConfirmMessage: Your progress will not be saved.

analytics.pageSubtitle: Visualization and analysis of user behavior data
analytics.emptyDescription: Analytics data will appear here once users start taking quizzes.
analytics.topicAccuracySubtitle: Accuracy and average response time per topic
analytics.responseTimeDistSubtitle: Histogram of time taken to answer
analytics.sectionResponseSubtitle: Average response time comparison by section
analytics.correlationSubtitle: Do faster responses tend to have higher accuracy?
analytics.retentionVarianceSubtitle: Shows that retention varies significantly between users even at the same fixed interval (higher std dev = more individual variation)
analytics.boxDistSubtitle: Number of questions per SRS box
analytics.retentionByBoxSubtitle: Retention rate and review interval per level
analytics.masteryDistSubtitle: Avg {{avg}} days to reach Box 4 (Median: {{median}} days)
analytics.fixedIntervalAnnotation: The fixed-interval review schedule ({{intervals}}) cannot adapt to differences in retention patterns across learners. The graph above shows that even at the same box level, retention rates vary significantly depending on learner characteristics (response speed and accuracy). An adaptive algorithm needs to dynamically adjust review intervals based on individual memory patterns.
analytics.studyPatternSubtitle: Active user count and average study time trends
analytics.learnerSegmentSubtitle: 4-quadrant classification by response speed x accuracy
analytics.segmentSrsSubtitle: Different retention rates by segment even at the same fixed interval

admin.deleteQuizConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this quiz?
admin.deleteSectionConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this section?

loginPrompt.title: Free trial limit reached
loginPrompt.description: Create an account to save your study records and track your progress.
